    • Maps and Metro

We’re right in the Middle

Everyone who lives here knows that our location defines convenience. We’re centrally located in Fairfax County with easy access to public transportation and major highways.

View Larger Map

You can also use our Neighborhood Map

Travel and Commuting

The entrance to the Beltway is just 1 mile away – with the Route 66 interchange just a couple of miles beyond that. And we are about 100 feet from two Metrobus lines. But more important, we’re about 2 miles away from Metro (both Dunn Loring and West Falls Church). You can walk there on snowy days. We are also only 1/2 mile from the Washington and Old Dominion (W&OD) bike trail.

We’re close to all kinds of things!

We’re just 15 miles away from the nation’s capital. We’re 1 mile away from the recently completed Mosaic District, just 5 miles from all the stores at Tysons Corner mall, 10 miles from the music under the stars at Wolf Trap, 15 miles away from the Smithsonian, 65 miles from the unbeatable views on Skyline Drive in Shenandoah National Park , and 265 miles from the wide beaches of the Outer Banks.

And just in case you need it, here’s a map of our community. Use it if you need to e-mail directions to your home to your friends and guests.

2731 Hyson Lane, Falls Church, Virginia 22043
Community Office Phone: 703-560-8920
